# MainframeStudyHub

> Free IBM Z mainframe learning platform with 560+ lessons across 15 topics, AI-powered Code Lab, 200+ quizzes, and live community.

## Tutorials (15 Topics, 560+ Lessons)

- [JCL Tutorial](https://mainframestudyhub.com/topics/jcl) — 86 lessons: JOB, EXEC, DD, procedures, utilities, interview Q&A
- [COBOL Tutorial](https://mainframestudyhub.com/topics/cobol) — 60 lessons: divisions, file handling, DB2, CICS, performance
- [DB2 Tutorial](https://mainframestudyhub.com/topics/db2) — SQL, cursors, SQLCA, isolation levels, EXPLAIN, RUNSTATS
- [CICS Tutorial](https://mainframestudyhub.com/topics/cics) — pseudo-conversational, BMS maps, file control, web services
- [VSAM Tutorial](https://mainframestudyhub.com/topics/vsam) — KSDS, ESDS, RRDS, IDCAMS, alternate indexes
- [REXX Tutorial](https://mainframestudyhub.com/topics/rexx) — EXECIO, OUTTRAP, PARSE, TSO automation
- [IMS DB/DC Tutorial](https://mainframestudyhub.com/topics/imsdb) — DL/I calls, PCB/PSB, segments, SSA
- [z/OS Fundamentals](https://mainframestudyhub.com/topics/zos) — LPAR, TSO/ISPF, JES, catalogs, SMS, WLM
- [RACF Security](https://mainframestudyhub.com/topics/security) — users, groups, profiles, PERMIT
- [TSO/ISPF Tutorial](https://mainframestudyhub.com/topics/tso) — edit commands, SDSF, dataset management
- [SMF & Performance](https://mainframestudyhub.com/topics/smf) — SMF records, RMF, WLM
- [CA-7 Scheduling](https://mainframestudyhub.com/topics/ca7) — predecessors, schedule IDs, job streams
- [Linux on Z](https://mainframestudyhub.com/topics/linuxonz) — z/VM, LPAR, consolidation
- [Modernization](https://mainframestudyhub.com/topics/modernization) — Zowe, z/OS Connect, APIs, DevOps
- [DFSORT & Utilities](https://mainframestudyhub.com/topics/procs) — SORT, ICETOOL, JOINKEYS

## Features

- [All Topics](https://mainframestudyhub.com/topics) — Browse all 15 topics
- [Quiz](https://mainframestudyhub.com/quiz) — 200+ questions with daily challenges
- [Scenarios](https://mainframestudyhub.com/scenarios) — 52 real-world mainframe scenarios
- [Abend Solver](https://mainframestudyhub.com/abends) — 87 IBM abend codes with fixes
- [AI Code Lab](https://mainframestudyhub.com/playground) — Claude-powered explainer and simulator
- [Career Roadmap](https://mainframestudyhub.com/roadmap) — Trainee to Architect path
- [Community](https://mainframestudyhub.com/community) — Live chat and Q&A forum
- [Blog](https://mainframestudyhub.com/blog) — Expert articles
- [Feedback](https://mainframestudyhub.com/feedback) — Share feedback and suggestions
- [About](https://mainframestudyhub.com/about) — Built by Harikrishnan K
